text: As I stand here, I am enveloped in an air of curiosity and contemplation. The environment feels experimental—part laboratory, part art gallery—blurring boundaries between observation and participation. The philosophy of 'R+D' (Research and Development) invites me to embrace confusion as a state of possibility, where meaning is shaped by the interplay of perception, technology, and interpretation. I feel both observer and participant, questioning where understanding truly resides.
